homepage.textContent: <iframe src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T8QZMLTX" height="0" width="0" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" aria-hidden="true"></iframe> ATHENS | PIRAEUS HOMESERVICESEmergency Line 24/7Diagnostic ExaminationsAmbulanceFit-to-Fly CertificateABOUT USBLOGCONTACT HOMESERVICESEmergency Line 24/7Diagnostic ExaminationsAmbulanceFit-to-Fly CertificateABOUT USBLOGCONTACT CALL NOW Why choose us. Get the best medical assistance at your hotel or accommodation in Greece through our clinics and partners… just a call away! REQUEST ASSISTACE 24/7 +30 210 7000020WHATSAPP: +30 6986663885 No1 Emergency Medical Assistance in Greece Find Doctors in Athens and PiraeusLooking for doctors in Athens or Piraeus? Doctor Greece provides immediate access to experienced medical professionals offering 24/7 emergency medical assistance anywhere in Athens and Piraeus. Our mission is to deliver exceptional, compassionate healthcare that is expert-led and always accessible. We promote a culture of safety, respect, and fast response – the foundation of quality emergency services in Greece.Why choose Doctor Greece?Top-rated emergency doctors in Athens and Piraeus24/7 availability for urgent medical needsTrusted by locals, expats, and touristsSwift response time and multilingual careDoctor Greece's TeamAt your Service 24/7 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE + 0 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE + 0 01High-Quality Medical Services in Athens Our emergency doctors adhere to strict international healthcare standards.Our qualified multilingual doctors can treat you at clinics or directly at your location in Athens, Piraeus, and beyond. 02Multilingual Medical Staff We understand the importance of communication during emergencies. Our multilingual doctors in Greece offer personalized care ensuring clarity and comfort throughout your treatment. 0324/7 Emergency Call Center Get immediate access to trusted emergency medical assistance – available 24/7. +30 2107000020 24/7 Emergency Call CenterDoctor Greece offers a dedicated 24/7 emergency medical helpline so you can get urgent healthcare support anytime, anywhere in Greece. Whether you're in Athens, Piraeus, or a Greek island — we're just a call away.Doctor at Your Location – Athens & PiraeusNeed a doctor visit at your hotel or Airbnb in Athens or Piraeus? Our mobile medical team delivers prompt care at your doorstep, so you can stay comfortable while receiving top-tier healthcare.Urgent Medical Care in Athens & PiraeusWhether it’s a sudden illness, injury, or pressing concern, our multilingual doctors and nurses are available 24/7 for urgent care. We provide fast, reliable medical attention that can’t wait for a routine appointment.Fast Prescription ServiceNeed medication fast? Our prescription service in Greece ensures you get your prescription or refill delivered quickly and safely. Our doctors assess your condition and arrange the right treatment—on-site or remotely.Fit-to-Fly Certificate in Athens & PiraeusNeed a Fit-to-Fly medical certificate? Doctor Greece offers fast, accurate assessments for travelers recovering from illness, injury, or managing chronic conditions. Our certified doctors issue official medical clearance for air travel from anywhere in Greece.Emergency Ambulance Services in Athens & PiraeusOur fully equipped ambulance service in Greece ensures fast and secure patient transport. Whether you’re in Athens or Piraeus our paramedics and doctors provide life-saving support on the way to clinics or hospitals.Diagnostic Examinations with Rapid ResultsAccess a wide range of diagnostic tests in Greece — from bloodwork and imaging to COVID tests — all performed with precision and speed. Available at your location or partnered diagnostic centers in Athens, Piraeus, and beyond.Coverage of Medical Expenses with InsuranceWe work directly with major international health insurance providers to offer smooth claim processing, reduced out-of-pocket costs, and high-quality care at better pricing. Save time and money with our coordinated medical billing support. WE'VE GOT YOU COVERED Medical Expense Coverage for International PatientsHassle-Free Medical Insurance ManagementEnjoy cashless healthcare in Greece with our seamless insurance support system. Doctor Greece simplifies the entire medical expense process so you can focus on your recovery — not your receipts. Transparent Payment ProcedureOur clear and supportive payment procedures for foreign patients help eliminate financial uncertainty. Whether you’re covered by travel insurance or private health insurance, we guide you every step of the way.Trusted Insurance PartnershipsWe work with top-tier international insurance companies to provide insured patients with high-quality medical care in Greece. Our strong global network ensures fast claims processing and peace of mind. PRICING Pricing for Uninsured and Reimbursement-Based PatientsThis section applies to patients without active insurance or those planning to pay upfront and claim reimbursement from their provider. Clinic Visit - GP Consultation €90 The fee for a clinic visit includes:Medical consultation with a licensed physician Issuance of a prescription, if deemed necessary by the doctor Please note: This price does not include any further treatment, diagnostic tests, or procedures that may be recommended following the consultation. These will be charged separately. Online Consultation & Prescription €90 Book an online consultation via WhatsApp or Viber with a licensed Iassis Medical doctor. The doctor will provide a diagnosis, advice, and an electronic prescription if necessary. Prescription Renewal €60 If you need a repeat prescription for a previously issued medication, simply send us a clear photo of your existing prescription. After review, a licensed Iassis Medical physician will issue a renewed prescription electronically, when appropriate. Follow Up Clinic Visit - GP Consultation €40 The fee for a clinic visit includes:Medical consultation with a licensed physician Issuance of a prescription, if deemed necessary by the doctor Please note: This price does not include any further treatment, diagnostic tests, or procedures that may be recommended following the consultation. These will be charged separately. Hotel Visit - GP Consultation €115 This service includes:On-site visit by a General Practitioner to your hotel Medical consultation and evaluation Prescription issuance, if medically necessary Important Notes:This fee does not include any additional treatment, diagnostic tests, or procedures, which will be charged separately if required. Additional charges may apply in the following cases: If the visit location is outside the central Athens area For visits during Late Hours (22:00 – 09:00) Please contact us for an exact quote based on your location and time of request. Ambulance from €100 Additional charges may apply in the following cases: If the visit location is outside the central Athens area For visits during Late Hours (22:00 – 09:00) Please contact us for an exact quote based on your location and time of request. Additional Services Fit to Fly Certificate €40 Lab Tests from €15 Rapid Test €10 Flu Triple Test €20 Your Trusted Medical Team in AthensDoctor Greece is a dedicated team of licensed healthcare professionals focused on delivering high-quality medical care to both local residents and international visitors. Based in Athens, the team is available around the clock, offering prompt and professional services to patients who need immediate medical attention, ongoing care, or specialist consultations.The medical team includes experienced physicians across a wide range of specialties, such as Internal Medicine, Pediatrics, Orthopaedics, General Practice, Plastic Surgery, Dermatology, Cardiology, Gynaecology, and ENT. This multidisciplinary approach ensures that patients receive comprehensive, evidence-based care under one coordinated service.Doctor Greece is committed to professionalism, medical ethics, and complete price transparency. Services are accessible to both insured and uninsured individuals, with detailed documentation provided for insurance reimbursement. Whether you are a tourist visiting Greece with or without active insurance coverage, Doctor Greece provides clear, upfront pricing and medical documentation to support your needs.Patients can expect 24/7 availability, including holidays and weekends, with medical visits offered at clinics, private residences, or hotels. The team is trained to communicate effectively in English and other languages, offering culturally sensitive care and peace of mind throughout the treatment process.With a reliable network of specialists and diagnostic support, Doctor Greece ensures continuity of care, timely treatment, and patient-centered service at every step. YEARS 0 SERV. 0 STAFF 0 SPOTS 0 OUR COMMITMENT Medical Specialists in Athens & PiraeusDoctor Greece stands as a committed group of healthcare experts with a specific emphasis on delivering top-tier medical assistance to residents and tourists alike in Greece.Our main objective is to guarantee that both vacationers and the local population can avail the services of proficient medical professionals at any hour of the day. GP Internist Surgeon E.N.T. Orhopaedician Cardiologist Dermatologist Pediatrician Gynaecologist Obstetrician Opthalmologist Plastic Surgeon SYMPTOMS We can help you with the following conditions: InjuriesDoctor Greece offers immediate care for any type of injury, from fractures to soft tissue damage, with options for pain management and wound care. Acute RashesIf you’re experiencing sudden skin rashes, Doctor Greece offers fast and professional consultations to diagnose the cause and provide treatment options like topical medications. Colds & CoughsWe’ll assess whether your cough is caused by an infection or another issue and provide the most appropriate medication or therapy to ease symptoms. Sore ThroatOur doctors will evaluate your sore throat to determine the cause, offering treatment options ranging from pain relievers to antibiotics if necessary. FeverDoctor Greece can help determine the underlying cause of a fever and provide medications to manage temperature and discomfort. FluWe provide timely treatment for flu symptoms, including antiviral medications and symptom management to help you recover faster. COVID-19With COVID-19 concerns still prevalent, Doctor Greece offers testing, advice on quarantine, and treatment for symptoms to ensure you stay safe. SunburnIf you’ve been overexposed to the sun, Doctor Greece can offer treatment for sunburn symptoms, from cooling gels to advice on preventing further skin damage. Photoallergic ReactionIf you’re experiencing allergic reactions to the sun or other environmental factors, our team can provide relief through topical treatments and advice on avoidance. Ear InfectionsIf you’re suffering from ear infections, we offer immediate consultations and treatments like antibiotics or pain management to alleviate discomfort. Eye InfectionsWhether it’s conjunctivitis or another infection, Doctor Greece can diagnose and offer eye drops or other treatments to clear up your condition promptly. Eye ProblemsFrom irritation to more severe issues, Doctor Greece provides expert diagnosis and treatments to help with a variety of eye problems, including referrals if necessary. Stomach AcheDoctor Greece offers diagnosis and treatment for a range of stomach issues, from indigestion to more serious conditions like infections or ulcers. AsthmaFor those with asthma, Doctor Greece ensures timely care, providing advice on proper inhalation techniques and medications to manage attacks effectively. RELIABLE MEDICAL ASSISTANCE 24/7 Ambulance Service in AthensNeed an ambulance in Athens fast? Doctor Greece delivers round-the-clock emergency ambulance services with expert care and fast response. Whether it’s a critical health episode, injury, or transfer to a clinic, our team ensures immediate medical assistance across Athens.Our ambulances are:* Staffed by certified doctors & paramedics* Equipped with advanced life-saving technology* Available 24/7 for urgent transport to hospitals or diagnostic centersWe serve residents, travelers, and tourists with fast, professional care at any hour. OUR COMMITMENT 24/7 Operation​Our clinics operate every day of the year 24/7. Whether it's day or night, you can request medical services at your location, be it your hotel or home. Should you need additional diagnostic assessment or therapeutic treatment, our ambulances are readily available to transport you to one of our private hospitals. There, our medical team will attend to you promptly. For less severe health concerns, we guarantee that after a few hours of hospital care, you'll be able to resume your normal activities, whether it's work, travel, or vacation. OUR PRINCIPLES Why choose Doctor GreeceProfessionalismAll our doctors are officialy registered in Greece, having years of experience in medical attention to patients in both private and public health systems. TransparencyOur patients are provided with all the required information before and after the doctor’s visit. Treatments are registered in the invoice provided for your health insurance.Secure PaymentsAll our consultations at clinics or home visits can be paid by card. CONTACT US Get In TouchIn case emergency or any medical need to not hesitate to contact us +30 2107000020 Name Phone Email Choose Location Your AccommodationAthensPiraeus Your Accommodation Your Message Send Powered By Iassis Medical - Just a call awayContact Phone : +30 2107000020 Email : info@doctorgreece.gr Locations : Athens, Piraeus Country : Greece Copyright 2025 Doctor Greece Privacy Policy & Terms of Use Business Registry No: 129936807000 {"prefetch":[{"source":"document","where":{"and":[{"href_matches":"/*"},{"not":{"href_matches":["/wp-*.php","/wp-admin/*","/wp-content/uploads/*","/wp-content/*","/wp-content/plugins/*","/wp-content/themes/clinical/*","/*\\?(.+)"]}},{"not":{"selector_matches":"a[rel~=\"nofollow\"]"}},{"not":{"selector_matches":".no-prefetch, .no-prefetch a"}}]},"eagerness":"conservative"}]} {"baseUrl":"https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/72x72/","ext":".png","svgUrl":"https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/","svgExt":".svg","source":{"concatemoji":"https://www.doctorgreece.gr/wp-includes/js/wp-emoji-release.min.js?ver=6.9.4"}} /* */ /*! about.textContent: <iframe src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T8QZMLTX" height="0" width="0" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" aria-hidden="true"></iframe> ATHENS | PIRAEUS HOMESERVICESEmergency Line 24/7Diagnostic ExaminationsAmbulanceFit-to-Fly CertificateABOUT USBLOGCONTACT HOMESERVICESEmergency Line 24/7Diagnostic ExaminationsAmbulanceFit-to-Fly CertificateABOUT USBLOGCONTACT CALL NOW About UsYEARS OF EXPERIENCE 0 + IASSIS MEDICAL GROUP A Legacy of CareDoctor Greece, is home to a dedicated team of healthcare professionals committed to providing top-tier medical services for both local residents and international visitors. Our primary mission is to ensure seamless, round-the-clock access to highly experienced medical staff, catering to the needs of both tourists and the local community with efficiency and care. 01Professionalism All our doctors are officialy registered in Greece, having years of experience. 02Transparency Patients are provided with all the required information before and after the doctor’s visit. 03Insurance Coverage All medical expenses are covered by your medical insurance. Within our multi-disciplinary clinics, certified doctors specialize in various medical fields, including Internal Medicine, Pediatrics, Orthopaedics, General Practice, Plastic Surgery, Dermatology, Cardiology, Gynaecology, and ENT. Additionally, our collaboration with radiology and laboratory centers allows us to provide a comprehensive range of treatments. Over the years, our facilities have effectively treated thousands of patients in a patient-centric care environment. Our professional and multilingual staff ensures the delivery of high-quality medical care, facilitating a swift, stress-free, and painless recovery. Our patients can quickly return to their daily routines or holiday activities with confidence. Our robust infrastructure enables us to accommodate more than 40 patients simultaneously, helping individuals in need of medical attention avoid long hospital waiting times. We also offer on-call medical services in the comfort of hotel rooms, along with ambulance transfers when indicated—services we have been providing for the past 15 years.Doctor Greece's team collaborates closely, prioritizing patient safety and convenience above all.Dedicated TeamDoctor Greece is a dedicated team of healthcare professionals committed to providing top-tier medical services to both local residents and international visitors. The team offers a wide range of medical specialties, including Internal Medicine, Pediatrics, Orthopaedics, General Practice, Plastic Surgery, Dermatology, Cardiology, Gynaecology, and ENT. With a focus on professionalism, transparency, and comprehensive insurance coverage, Doctor Greece ensures continuous access to experienced medical staff, available around the clock, to meet the diverse healthcare needs of their patients. YEARS 0 SERV. 0 STAFF 0 SPOTS 0 24/7 ASSISTANCE Facing an emergency?Greece is one of the top tourist destinations in the Mediterranean. An estimated 27.8 million tourists will visit Greece in 2022 according to the Association Of Greek Tourist Enterprises (SETE).There is a number of reasons why people enjoying their holiday bear a higher risk to be involved in emergency situations such as an acute illness or more complicated cases because of an injury caused by an accident.Data among travelers during vacation show that injuries of any kind, minor or major comprise the leading cause for consulting a physician or for being hospitalized abroad. What is the response time for Doctor Greece services?Doctor Greece aims to provide assistance within 20–45 minutes for house calls in central Athens. Are the services covered by travel insurance?Most travel insurance plans recognize Doctor Greece’s services. It’s advisable to verify with your provider for exact details. Can Doctor Greece assist with prescription renewals?Can Doctor Greece assist with prescription renewals? How much do Doctor Greece services cost?Costs depend on the service provided. Doctor Greece is transparent with pricing and accepts major credit cards. Do I need an appointment to access services?While appointments are encouraged, Doctor Greece also provides on-demand care for emergencies. What types of diagnostic examinations are available?Doctor Greece offers a comprehensive range of diagnostic examinations, including blood tests, urinalysis, ultrasound, X-rays, CT scans, MRI scans, gastroscopy, colonoscopy, proctosigmoidoscopy, and esophagoscopy. Are diagnostic examinations covered by insurance?Doctor Greece collaborates with numerous international insurance companies to ensure that medical expenses are covered, providing a seamless experience for patients How long does it take to receive laboratory test results?The turnaround time varies depending on the type of test and the laboratory’s processing time. Doctor Greece will provide an estimated timeline for receiving your test results. Can I request specific laboratory tests?Yes, Doctor Greece welcomes patient input and collaborates to address health concerns. If you have specific laboratory tests in mind, discuss them during your appointment. What should I do in case of a medical emergency?In case of a medical emergency, remain calm and focused. Dial emergency services immediately if urgent medical attention is required. While waiting for help to arrive, follow any first aid procedures you’re familiar with and provide reassurance to the individual in distress. How can I contact Doctor Greece?You can reach Doctor Greece 24/7 via phone at +30 210 700 0020 or email at info@doctorgreece.gr Some reasons for this increased risk are:1. Tourists during vacation are exposed to unfamiliar and perhaps risky environments2. There are differences in language and communication3. The so called vacation spirit leads to more risk taking behavior by the tourist Other common causes1. Sunburns of any degree2. Insect bites complicated by a superinfection of the surrounding skin3. Allergies, Rashes4. Gastroenteritis or food poisoning5. Fever due to bacterial or viral infection6. Cough due to a chronic or an acute respiratory disease7. Symptoms from the urinary tract, pain under urination, presence of blood in the urine or inability to urinate8. Pain in the abdomen9. Pain in the chest10. Dehydration due to long exposure to the sun resulting to sunstroke11. Headache, dizziness, Vertigo12. High blood pressure13. High Blood Sugar ( hyperglycemia ) or Low Blood Sugar ( Hypoglycemia )14. Acute alcohol intoxication15. Minor trauma, cut wounds or sprains of the upper or lower extremities16. Sore throat, difficulties in swallowing17. Pain in the back18. Earache due to ear wax or ear infection19. Toothache or any other dental emergency20. Bleeding from the Stomach or Bleeding from the Bowel ( Black or red, bloody Stools)21. Loss of consciousness22. Sea urchin stings23. FracturesEthics ☆☆☆☆☆ Rated 5 out of 5Our mission is to deliver exemplary, compassionate care that is expertly led and easily ccessible, fostering a culture of safety, courtesy, and responsiveness. Our unwavering ommitment is to place our patients' needs at the forefront of every service we offer, navigating the dynamic landscape of an ever-evolving world with dedication and integrity.Upholding the Hippocratic Oath is not merely an event but a steadfast commitment that guides our every action. CLINIC GALENUSOne Day Clinics Zakynthos & LefkasMORE INFO IASSIS MEDICALNetwork of Surgeries Athens, ZakynthosMORE INFO IASSISTNetwork of Surgeries LefkasMORE INFO ALPHA HEALTHNetwork of Surgeries ZakynthosMORE INFO MET COSMETICPlastic Surgery - Dermatology Athens, Patra, Preveza, Pyrgos, Zakynthos, LefkasMORE INFO MY HAIR GREECEHair Transplant - F.U.E. Athens, Patra, Preveza, Pyrgos, Zakynthos, LefkasMORE INFOOver the years, our facilities have effectively treated thousands of patients in a patient-centric care environment. Our professional and multilingual staff ensures the delivery of high-quality medical care, facilitating a swift, stress-free, and painless recovery. We also offer on-call medical services in the comfort of hotel rooms, along with ambulance transfers when indicated—services we have been providing for the past 15 years. IASSIS MEDICAL GROUP team collaborates closely, prioritizing patient safety and convenience above all. Upholding the Hippocratic Oath is not merely an event but a steadfast commitment that guides our every action. metadata.title: Ambulance - Doctor Greece
metadata.metaDescription: Ambulance. Our Emergency Line at DoctorGreece is available 24/7 to provide ambulance service ,assistance and support.
metadata.openGraphDescription: Ambulance. Our Emergency Line at DoctorGreece is available 24/7 to provide ambulance service ,assistance and support.

services.textContent: <iframe src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T8QZMLTX" height="0" width="0" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" aria-hidden="true"></iframe> ATHENS | PIRAEUS HOMESERVICESEmergency Line 24/7Diagnostic ExaminationsAmbulanceFit-to-Fly CertificateABOUT USBLOGCONTACT HOMESERVICESEmergency Line 24/7Diagnostic ExaminationsAmbulanceFit-to-Fly CertificateABOUT USBLOGCONTACT CALL NOW Ambulance Service 24/7Ambulance 24/7 Ambulance ServiceIn moments of medical emergencies, having access to timely and professional assistance can make all the difference. At DoctorGreece, we understand the critical importance of swift response and quality care in such situations, which is why we’re proud to offer our First Aid Ambulance – a reliable lifeline for individuals in need of urgent medical attention. Our Emergency Line for Hellenic Ambulance operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, ensuring that help is always available when you need it most. Whether it’s a sudden illness, injury, or any other medical concern, our experienced medical professionals are standing by to guide you through the situation with calmness, expertise, and compassion.01Quality Standards Quality standards for patient's health, when they are in Greece. Our team of multiligual doctors will help in clinics or at your location. 02Multilingual Staff Our multilingual doctors provide a comprehensive medical service in Greece, directly or through our partners. 03Emergency Call Center Everyday 24/7 +30 2107000020 In Case of EmergencyIn case of emergency, it’s crucial to remain calm and focused. Remember to dial emergency services immediately if you or someone else requires urgent medical attention. While waiting for help to arrive, follow any first aid procedures you’re familiar with and provide reassurance to the individual in distress. Time is of the essence, so act quickly and decisively to ensure the best possible outcome. Accessing 24/7 Ambulance Number GreeceAt DoctorGreece, we’re not just a medical service provider – we’re your trusted partner in moments of crisis. When you choose DoctorGreece Ambulance Service, you’re choosing peace of mind, knowing that help is always just a call away. So remember, in times of medical emergencies, trust DoctorGreece to be there for you, providing expert care and support when you need it most. contact.textContent: <iframe src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T8QZMLTX" height="0" width="0" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" aria-hidden="true"></iframe> ATHENS | PIRAEUS HOMESERVICESEmergency Line 24/7Diagnostic ExaminationsAmbulanceFit-to-Fly CertificateABOUT USBLOGCONTACT HOMESERVICESEmergency Line 24/7Diagnostic ExaminationsAmbulanceFit-to-Fly CertificateABOUT USBLOGCONTACT CALL NOW ContactClose to the ClientFrom the loss of a medication, to a medical emergency, we can help to solve any medical problem.Attention to DetailWhenever is needed we can coordinate tests or image proofs in the best clinics or hospitals of each area. CONTACT US Get In TouchIn case emergency or any medical need to not hesitate to contact us. Name Phone Email Choose Location Your AccommodationAthensPiraeus Your Accommodation Your Message Send On Call Medical Services +30 210 7000020 info@doctorgreece.gr FAQ What is the response time for Doctor Greece services?Doctor Greece aims to provide assistance within 20–45 minutes for house calls in central Athens. Are the services covered by travel insurance?Most travel insurance plans recognize Doctor Greece’s services. Verify with your provider for exact details. Can Doctor Greece assist with prescription renewals?Yes, they can refill prescriptions and collaborate with local pharmacies for quick delivery. How much do Doctor Greece services cost?Costs depend on the service, but Doctor Greece is transparent with pricing and accepts major credit cards. Do I need an appointment to access services?While appointments are encouraged, Doctor Greece also provides on-demand care for emergencies. Is telemedicine suitable for non-emergent cases?Absolutely! Telemedicine consultations are ideal for minor ailments or when seeking professional advice. metadata.title: Find the best Surgeon near you - Doctor Greece
metadata.metaDescription: Trust DoctorGreece's Surgery Department for expert surgical care in Greece. Our skilled surgeons are available 24/7. Just make a call
metadata.openGraphTitle: Find the best Surgeon near you - Doctor Greece
metadata.openGraphDescription: Trust DoctorGreece's Surgery Department for expert surgical care in Greece. Our skilled surgeons are available 24/7. Just make a call

team.textContent: <iframe src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T8QZMLTX" height="0" width="0" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" aria-hidden="true"></iframe> ATHENS | PIRAEUS HOMESERVICESEmergency Line 24/7Diagnostic ExaminationsAmbulanceFit-to-Fly CertificateABOUT USBLOGCONTACT HOMESERVICESEmergency Line 24/7Diagnostic ExaminationsAmbulanceFit-to-Fly CertificateABOUT USBLOGCONTACT CALL NOW Best Surgeons in GreeceSurgeon Our Surgery DepartmentAt our medical clinic in Greece, our Surgery Department is dedicated to providing top-quality surgical care to our patients. Our team of experienced surgeons are experts in their respective fields, delivering compassionate and personalized treatment to help you achieve the best possible outcomes. COLLABORATION WITH HOSPITALS DoctorGreece has established partnerships with reputable facilities across Greece. This collaborative network ensures a smooth transition from emergency response to ongoing care, guaranteeing a continuum of high-quality treatment from the moment assistance is requested.Why choose us Emergency Surgical Solutions DoctorGreece Emergency Medical Services recognizes the urgency of medical situations. In the event that you require a surgeon promptly, the platform can facilitate immediate access to qualified professionals. This quick response is a testament to the platform’s commitment to ensuring the well-being of individuals in their time of need. Coordinated Care Medical emergencies can encompass a broad range of issues, and DoctorGreece understands the importance of a comprehensive approach. Whether you’re dealing with a sudden injury, a critical illness, or any other surgical emergency, the platform’s network of surgeons spans various specializations, ensuring that you receive the precise care required for your situation. 24/7 Accessibility Health crises don’t adhere to regular business hours, and neither does DoctorGreece Emergency Medical Services. The platform operates around the clock, seven days a week, ensuring that assistance is just a phone call away, no matter when you need it. Efficient Communication In times of emergency, effective communication is paramount. DoctorGreece Emergency Medical Services prioritizes clear and efficient communication, ensuring that your situation is relayed accurately to the medical professionals involved. This streamlined approach reduces response times and enhances the overall quality of care. Comprehensive Services We offer a full range of services, including preventive care, diagnostic testing, medical management, and interventional procedures. From routine screenings to advanced treatments, we are committed to delivering the highest standard of care to our patients. State-of-the-Art Facilities Our Surgery Department is equipped with state-of-the-art technology and advanced cardiac imaging tools to support accurate diagnoses and effective treatments. We stay up-to-date with the latest advancements to ensure that our patients receive the best possible care.01Quality Standards Quality standards for patient's health, when they are in Greece. Our team of multiligual doctors will help in clinics or at your location. 02Multilingual Staff Our multilingual doctors provide a comprehensive medical service in Greece, directly or through our partners. 03Emergency Call Center Everyday 24/7 +30 2107000020 Navigating Emergency Medical Services with DoctorGreeceWhy choose us Expert Surgeons Our team consists of highly skilled surgeons with extensive training and expertise in a wide range of surgical procedures. Whether you require general surgery, orthopedic surgery, neurosurgery, or any other specialized procedure, you can trust that you are in capable hands. Advanced Technology We utilize state-of-the-art surgical technology and equipment to ensure precise and effective procedures. From minimally invasive techniques to robotic-assisted surgery, we leverage the latest advancements to provide the best possible care to our patients. Comprehensive Services Our team consists of highly skilled surgeons with extensive training and expertise in a wide range of surgical procedures. Whether you require general surgery, orthopedic surgery, neurosurgery, or any other specialized procedure, you can trust that you are in capable hands. Patient-Centered Care We prioritize the well-being and comfort of our patients throughout their surgical journey. Our surgeons take the time to thoroughly explain procedures, address any concerns, and provide personalized care plans to ensure optimal outcomes and recovery.A Safety Net for Your HealthIn the unfortunate event of a medical emergency during your stay in Greece, DoctorGreece Emergency Medical Services emerges as a reliable and efficient solution. The platform’s dedication to timely responses, coordination across specializations, and collaboration with esteemed medical institutions ensures that you are in capable hands, even in the face of unexpected health challenges. Navigating a medical emergency abroad can be overwhelming, but with DoctorGreece Emergency Medical Services, you can have confidence in the accessibility of top-notch surgical care when you need it most. Your safety and well-being are the top priorities, and DoctorGreece is here to provide the support you deserve. Navigating Emergency Medical Services with DoctorGreeceAccessing Emergency CareAt DoctorGreece, we understand that emergencies can happen when you least expect them. That’s why we’re dedicated to being there for you when you need us most. Our commitment to your health extends beyond regular clinic hours, ensuring that you have access to emergency medical care whenever you need it. With our team of experienced doctors and healthcare professionals, we’re equipped to handle a wide range of medical emergencies with expertise and compassion. Whether it’s a sudden illness, injury, or urgent medical condition, you can trust DoctorGreece to provide prompt and effective care. Our clinics are strategically located across Greece, including Athens, Zakynthos, Lefkas, Rhodes, and more, ensuring that help is never far away.Additionally, our telemedicine services enable you to consult with a doctor remotely in case of emergency when visiting a clinic is not feasible. When an emergency strikes, you can rely on DoctorGreece to be there for you, providing the urgent medical attention you need to stay healthy and safe. Your well-being is our priority, and we’re here to support you every step of the way.
